subject: QSR and Food Service

private_opportunities.title: McDonald's opening 8,000 restaurants with major upgrades
private_opportunities.snippet:
## McDonald’s unveils massive global expansion

McDonald’s has unveiled an ambitious roadmap to expand its global footprint, with plans to launch 8,000 new restaurants by the end of 2026. This aggressive expansion is the first phase of a larger mission to operate at least 50,000 locations worldwide by 2027. The strategy focuses on capturing high-traffic areas and entering emerging markets while simultaneously modernizing existing sites to keep pace with new corporate standards. [...] ## McDonald’s rolls out major menu and beverage overhaul

As part of this aggressive footprint expansion, McDonald’s is also reimagining its menu to capture a wider variety of dining habits. The most notable change comes from the company’s “CosMc’s” spinoff concept, which focuses on the high-margin beverage market. Following successful pilot testing, CosMc’s-inspired drinks are slated to roll out to more than 500 locations.

The innovation extends beyond the drink station and into the kitchen, where the chain is doubling down on its most popular proteins. McDonald’s is significantly expanding its chicken lineup, reintroducing a variety of wraps and launching upgraded sandwiches to meet the growing consumer demand for poultry. [...] Furthermore, the chain is returning to its roots with the “Better Burger Initiative.” This program is a comprehensive effort to elevate the quality of its core products through improved preparation techniques. By utilizing fresher ingredients and implementing tighter food-handling standards, McDonald’s aims to ensure that its signature burgers are served hotter and juicier.

## McDonald’s modernizes checkout experience for customers

private_opportunities.title: McDonald's CEO confirms 8000 new stores opening in ...
private_opportunities.snippet:
As the quick service chain continues to pursue its ambitious development plan, this means that the fast food giant is on track to open over 8,000 new locations around the world over the next two years.

McDonald’s announced in May that roughly 900 of these new stores would be located in the US, with the vast majority of the new restaurants slated for international markets.

China is a major expansion point for the chain, which is plotting to open thousands of new locations there in the coming years as McDonald’s competes against Mixue Bingcheng for consumers’ dollars. [...] “We have a clear trajectory for future growth as we continue to build on the brand strength, global footprint, and digital ecosystem that have resulted in unparalleled competitive advantages and cemented McDonald’s as one of the world’s leading consumer-facing brands.”

## TASTY SUCCESS

McDonald’s has seen great success since it was founded over eight decades ago.

The first location opened back in 1940, but it was not McDonald’s as we know it now.

Advertisement

Rather, it was a barbecue drive-in named “McDonald’s Bar-B-Q” opened by brothers Richard and Maurice McDonald, with its most famous item being hot dogs.

### McDonald's: by the numbers

The fast food giant outlined several of its targets for future growth back in 2023, including: [...] The chain’s CEO, Chris Kempczinski, shared McDonald’s plan to roll out over 8,000 new restaurants by the end of 2027.

private_opportunities.title: McDonald's Plans to Open Thousands of Locations And Sell Tastier ...
private_opportunities.snippet:
A view of the McDonald's restaurant in Mogilany, Poland, on August 1, 2025. (Photo by Jakub Porzycki/NurPhoto via Getty Images)Photo by NurPhoto on Getty Images

 (Photo by NurPhoto on Getty Images)

The year 2026 is set to be pivotal for McDonald's work to significantly expand its footprint worldwide. After the company launched its Accelerating the Arches initiative, it provided an update in December 2023 about how many new locations it intended to open over a short timeframe.

In its release, McDonald's announced that it had plans to have 50,000 locations operating globally by the end of 2027. Even though the first McDonald's was opened in 1940, the company stated that those expansion plans were the most aggressive ever. "This will mark the fastest period of growth in Company history." [...] Trays of McDonald's meals photographed on January 10, 2024. (Photo by Jakub Porzycki/NurPhoto via Getty Images)Photo by NurPhoto on Getty Images

 (Photo by NurPhoto on Getty Images)

The same December 2023 McDonald's press release that detailed the company's expansion plans revealed that 2026 was set to benefit from another ambitious effort that was underway. At that time, the Best Burger initiative had been commenced and was beginning to change the chain's offerings. That effort was planned to enhance the quality and flavor of McDonald’s food. [...] A recent Newsweek article about the plans stated that roughly 900 openings within the U.S. were planned as part of the multi-year expansion push. According to the McDonald's Corporate website, the company still has a lot of work to do to reach the previously announced benchmark on time. It states that the fast food chain currently has "44,000 locations, and counting." That means that there will have to be more than 5,000 additional location net openings by December 31, 2027, for the stated goal to be reached.

Advertisement

## McDonald’s Has Other Plans That Will Be Even More Noteworthy for Loyal Consumers

Trays of McDonald's meals photographed on January 10, 2024. (Photo by Jakub Porzycki/NurPhoto via Getty Images)Photo by NurPhoto on Getty Images

This aligns with our strategic objective to grow in the QSR and Food Service market. Immediate action is recommended to position PARTTEAM as a key supplier in this significant expansion.
